tracks.rawText: 4:00Fall Into You I Judah Earl & BRANDON BLACK #music #cinematic #orchestralmusic [EVOgyNszRS8]UploadCinematic ambient folk with post-rock influences, The track features a prominent acoustic guitar playing a repetitive, fingerpicked arpeggio pattern in 4/4 time, A clean electric guitar enters with ambient, long-tail reverb and delay, playing melodic swells and high-register lead lines, A cello provides a sustained, bowed low-end drone that shifts harmonically with the chord progression, Subtle glockenspiel or high-register piano accents punctuate the melodic phrases, The arrangement builds through layered instrumentation rather than percussion, The tempo is approximately 72 BPM in the key of G Major, The production is characterized by a wide stereo field and significant hall reverb on the melodic elements5PublishRemix
tracks.title: Fall Into You I Judah Earl & BRANDON BLACK #music #cinematic #orchestralmusic [EVOgyNszRS8]
